title: Podman Quadlets Install Replace Results In File Corruption
body:
### Issue Description

Running `podman quadlet install hello.quadlets` with the following file contents:

```ini
# FileName=hello
[Container]
ContainerName=hello
Image=docker.io/library/hello-world:latest
Environment=TZ=US/Central

[Service]
Restart=always

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
```

correctly generates the following systemd unit:

```ini
# Automatically generated by /usr/lib/systemd/user-generators/podman-user-generator
#
# FileName=hello
[X-Container]
ContainerName=hello
Image=docker.io/library/hello-world:latest
Environment=TZ=US/Central

[Service]
Restart=always
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i hello
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i hello
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name hello --replace --rm --cgroups=split --sdnotify=conmon -d --env TZ=US/Central docker.io/library/hello-world:latest

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
SourcePath=/home/mwagner/.config/containers/systemd/hello.container
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers
```

However after removing the line `Environment=TZ=US/Central` and running `podman quadlet install -r hello.quadlets`

```ini
# FileName=hello
[Container]
ContainerName=hello
Image=docker.io/library/hello-world:latest

[Service]
Restart=always

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
```

the install section of the systemd unit is corrupted:

```ini
# Automatically generated by /usr/lib/systemd/user-generators/podman-user-generator
#
# FileName=hello
[X-Container]
ContainerName=hello
Image=docker.io/library/hello-world:latest

[Service]
Restart=always
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i hello
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/podman rm -v -f -i hello
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name hello --replace --rm --cgroups=split --sdnotify=conmon -d docker.io/library/hello-world:latest

[Install]
WantedBy=default.targetl]
WantedBy=default.target

[Unit]
Wants=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
After=podman-user-wait-network-online.service
SourcePath=/home/mwagner/.config/containers/systemd/hello.container
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers
```

Deleting and reinstalling the quadlet does resolve the issue, however this does defeat the purpose of the replace option.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional information

It seems this may be a race condition issue with the install destination file being read by systemd, where the rename of the temp file can leave a corrupted state where the old and new content mix?

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/1c3374e38820e4ee1a8c654cc735c82d7f50a282/pkg/domain/infra/abi/quadlet.go#L323-L379

comments.body:
You are looking at the wrong code, the bug there has already been fixed in 6.0.0. This is a dup of https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/29013

I agree we should backport the bugfix to 5.8 however
